title: 20-Pack Aluminium Foil Trays with Paper Lids, 9x9 Inch Foil Food Containers with Lids – Oven & Freezer Safe Takeaway, Baking, and Storage Square Trays
features: Durable Aluminium Construction - These tin foil trays with lids are made from strong and sturdy aluminium, ensuring long-lasting use for all your takeaway, baking, and storage needs. Oven and freezer safe, these trays are a durable and convenient option for any kitchen.

Perfect for Baking and Storage - These foil takeaway containers with lids are a versatile and convenient solution for baking and storing food. Made with durable aluminum foil, they are oven and freezer safe, making them perfect for both cooking and storing leftovers. The paper lids provide a secure seal, keeping your food fresh and protected. Ideal for busy households and on-the-go meals, these foil containers make meal prep and storage a breeze.
Easy Takeaway Solution - Conveniently pack and transport your delicious meals with our 20-pack of takeaway containers with lids. Ideal for on-the-go meals, leftovers, and storage.
Suitable for Freezer Storage - Keep your leftovers or pre-made meals fresh with these foil trays for party food. Easily store and reheat meals with the convenience of paper lids.

Eco-Friendly & Disposable – Enjoy easy cleanup with these disposable foil trays. Whether used for takeout, catering, or storing food, these eco-friendly trays with lids offer a cost-effective solution that eliminates the need for washing dishes.
